hero.title: Packers & Movers in Bhubaneswar
hero.subtitle: Saheed Nagar to Infocity, Nayapalli to Patia — 310+ verified movers in the Temple City of India.

intro: Bhubaneswar is Odisha's modern capital, combining its thousand-temple heritage with a booming IT and education sector. ShiftIndia's 310+ verified vendors cover all areas — from old-town colonies to the Infocity tech corridor and KIIT-Patia belt.
whyUs: Bhubaneswar's planned grid layout makes logistics relatively straightforward, but the IT corridor's high-rise societies have strict access rules. Our vendors are familiar with these.

faqs.q: Do you cover the Infocity and KIIT area?
faqs.a: Yes — Infocity, Patia, Chandrasekharpur and KIIT are all covered.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Bhubaneswar?
Do you move to Kolkata and Visakhapatnam?
faqs.a: Yes, inter-city moves with full GPS tracking are available.
